case_title: HANDA, DOUGLAS vs. GARCIA, RAFAEL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HANDA, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RAFAEL GRANADOS, ANGLE SALVADOR DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-19-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-19-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-30-1994
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1994, CONTINUED TO OCT-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, RAFAEL

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-19-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-19-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
